question: Based on the annual data (including the partial year), what can we conclude about the latest year?

options.A: None of the above conclusions about the full-year trend are justified from this partial-year data
options.B: The latest year proves that copies sold is now permanently declining
options.C: The latest year has the lowest copies sold in the entire period
options.D: The latest year shows a sharp decline compared to previous years

explanation: The latest year in the chart only includes about 5 months of data, while previous years show full 12‑month totals. Comparing the partial-year value (439 copies) directly to full-year values like 1,092 copies creates the illusion of a sharp decline. We cannot draw full‑year conclusions from this incomplete aggregate.
